name: Insert a banner inside a keyed v-for parent
notes: Inserts a 4th <article> child into [data-edge-region='pricing-cards'] (PricingCards.vue's v-for parent, which binds exactly 3 plans via :key='plan.id'). Vue's hydrator reconciles the v-for and finds an unexpected 4th child with no matching vnode → discards it during recovery. This is the canonical 'additive into v-for parent' fragile case — distinct from case 04 (which inserts into an EMPTY static anchor and is therefore naturally tolerated). Annotator stamps data-allow-mismatch='children' on the parent; companion re-inserts post-hydration if Vue still discarded.

ops.html:
50% off all plans

Inserted at the edge, into a v-for parent. Without reinforcement Vue discards this on hydration.
